case_title: SUSANA LENI VS. WILLIAM JOSEPH SCHOEPP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LENI, SUSANA AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEPP, WILLIAM JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED MAR-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOEPP, WILLIAM JOSEPH
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENI, SUSANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCHOEPP, WILLIAM JOSEPH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.
